options.content:
# AI-Assisted Development Dashboard

Comprehensive view of AI coding assistant usage across your organization. Includes detection analytics, code churn analysis, and direct metrics from Cursor and Claude Code.

**Data Sources:** PR analysis (detection), Cursor Business API, Claude Code Admin API

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) as explicit_detections FROM ai_usage_signals s JOIN pull_requests pr ON s.pull_request_id = pr.id WHERE s.explicit_tool_detected = true AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM project_mapping pm WHERE pm.`table` = 'repos' AND pm.row_id = pr.base_repo_id AND pm.project_name in (${project:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(s.detected_at)

SELECT AVG(s.ai_confidence_score) as avg_confidence FROM ai_usage_signals s JOIN pull_requests pr ON s.pull_request_id = pr.id WHERE s.ai_confidence_score > 0 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM project_mapping pm WHERE pm.`table` = 'repos' AND pm.row_id = pr.base_repo_id AND pm.project_name in (${project:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(s.detected_at)

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_prs FROM ai_usage_signals s JOIN pull_requests pr ON s.pull_request_id = pr.id WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM project_mapping pm WHERE pm.`table` = 'repos' AND pm.row_id = pr.base_repo_id AND pm.project_name in (${project:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(s.detected_at)

SELECT COUNT(*) as high_confidence FROM ai_usage_signals s JOIN pull_requests pr ON s.pull_request_id = pr.id WHERE s.ai_confidence_score >= 70 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM project_mapping pm WHERE pm.`table` = 'repos' AND pm.row_id = pr.base_repo_id AND pm.project_name in (${project:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(s.detected_at)

SELECT COUNT(*) as medium_confidence FROM ai_usage_signals s JOIN pull_requests pr ON s.pull_request_id = pr.id WHERE s.ai_confidence_score >= 40 AND s.ai_confidence_score < 70 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM project_mapping pm WHERE pm.`table` = 'repos' AND pm.row_id = pr.base_repo_id AND pm.project_name in (${project:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(s.detected_at)

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(s.detected_tool, ''), 'unknown') as tool, COUNT(*) as count FROM ai_usage_signals s JOIN pull_requests pr ON s.pull_request_id = pr.id WHERE s.ai_confidence_score >= 40 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM project_mapping pm WHERE pm.`table` = 'repos' AND pm.row_id = pr.base_repo_id AND pm.project_name in (${project:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(s.detected_at) GROUP BY s.detected_tool ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT MIN(s.detected_at) as time, AVG(s.ai_confidence_score) as avg_score, SUM(CASE WHEN s.explicit_tool_detected = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as explicit_count FROM ai_usage_signals s JOIN pull_requests pr ON s.pull_request_id = pr.id WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM project_mapping pm WHERE pm.`table` = 'repos' AND pm.row_id = pr.base_repo_id AND pm.project_name in (${project:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(s.detected_at) GROUP BY DATE(s.detected_at) ORDER BY time

options.content:
**Code Churn** measures how much code is modified after initial merge. Research (GitClear) shows AI-generated code has ~41% higher churn rate. Lower churn = more stable code.

**Note:** Infrastructure files (.github/, package.json, config files) are excluded from churn analysis to prevent skewing metrics.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(churn_within30_days) / NULLIF(SUM(initial_additions + initial_deletions), 0), 0) as ai_churn FROM ai_churn_metrics WHERE is_ai_assisted = true AND project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(merged_at)

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(churn_within30_days) / NULLIF(SUM(initial_additions + initial_deletions), 0), 0) as non_ai_churn FROM ai_churn_metrics WHERE is_ai_assisted = false AND project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(merged_at)

SELECT COALESCE((ai.ai_churn - nonai.non_ai_churn) / NULLIF(nonai.non_ai_churn, 0) * 100, 0) as churn_difference_percent FROM (SELECT SUM(churn_within30_days) / NULLIF(SUM(initial_additions + initial_deletions), 0) as ai_churn FROM ai_churn_metrics WHERE is_ai_assisted = true AND project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(merged_at)) ai CROSS JOIN (SELECT SUM(churn_within30_days) / NULLIF(SUM(initial_additions + initial_deletions), 0) as non_ai_churn FROM ai_churn_metrics WHERE is_ai_assisted = false AND project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(merged_at)) nonai
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM ai_churn_metrics WHERE project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(merged_at)

SELECT MIN(merged_at) as time, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN is_ai_assisted = true THEN churn_within30_days ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN is_ai_assisted = true THEN initial_additions + initial_deletions ELSE 0 END), 0), 0) as ai_churn, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN is_ai_assisted = false THEN churn_within30_days ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN is_ai_assisted = false THEN initial_additions + initial_deletions ELSE 0 END), 0), 0) as non_ai_churn FROM ai_churn_metrics WHERE merged_at IS NOT NULL AND project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(merged_at) GROUP BY DATE(merged_at) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Code Churn Over Time: AI vs Non-AI

options.content: Direct metrics from AI coding tools. **Requires configured connections** - panels show 'No data' if Cursor Business or Claude Code connections aren't set up. *Note: These metrics are organization-wide and not filtered by project.*

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(total_suggestions) as suggestions FROM cursor_usage_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
SELECT SUM(total_acceptances) as acceptances FROM cursor_usage_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
SELECT AVG(acceptance_rate) as rate FROM cursor_usage_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
SELECT date as time, total_suggestions as suggestions, total_acceptances as acceptances, daily_active_users as active_users FROM cursor_usage_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date

SELECT user_email, SUM(tab_acceptances + composer_acceptances) as acceptances, AVG(acceptance_rate) as avg_rate, COUNT(DISTINCT date) as active_days FROM cursor_user_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(date) GROUP BY user_email ORDER BY acceptances DESC LIMIT 20

options.content: **Methodology:** Compare 90-day baseline period (before AI adoption) with 30-day current period (after adoption). Sign inverted for time metrics (faster = positive improvement).

targets.rawSql: SELECT pr_throughput_change FROM ai_impact_metrics WHERE project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at) ORDER BY calculated_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT review_time_change FROM ai_impact_metrics WHERE project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at) ORDER BY calculated_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT lead_time_change FROM ai_impact_metrics WHERE project_name in (${project:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(calculated_at) ORDER BY calculated_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT s.explicit_tools as ai_tool, pr.title as pr_title, pr.author_name, s.explicit_signal_score, s.ai_confidence_score as total_score, DATE(s.detected_at) as detected_date FROM ai_usage_signals s JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = s.pull_request_id WHERE s.explicit_tool_detected = true AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM project_mapping pm WHERE pm.`table` = 'repos' AND pm.row_id = pr.base_repo_id AND pm.project_name in (${project:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(s.detected_at) ORDER BY s.detected_at DESC LIMIT 25

panels.title: PRs with Explicit AI Tool Markers

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN s.explicit_tool_detected = true THEN 'Explicit (Confirmed)' WHEN s.ai_confidence_score >= 70 THEN 'High (≥70%)' WHEN s.ai_confidence_score >= 40 THEN 'Medium (40-69%)' ELSE 'Low (<40%)' END as confidence_level, COUNT(*) as count FROM ai_usage_signals s JOIN pull_requests pr ON s.pull_request_id = pr.id WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM project_mapping pm WHERE pm.`table` = 'repos' AND pm.row_id = pr.base_repo_id AND pm.project_name in (${project:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(s.detected_at) GROUP BY confidence_level ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT s.id, pr.title as pr_title, pr.author_name, s.detected_tool, s.explicit_tool_detected as explicit, s.explicit_signal_score, s.rapid_commit_score, s.pr_size_score, s.lines_per_minute_score, s.ai_confidence_score, DATE(s.detected_at) as detected_date FROM ai_usage_signals s JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = s.pull_request_id WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM project_mapping pm WHERE pm.`table` = 'repos' AND pm.row_id = pr.base_repo_id AND pm.project_name in (${project:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(s.detected_at) ORDER BY s.ai_confidence_score DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: All PRs by AI Confidence Score (with signal breakdown)

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT pm.project_name FROM project_mapping pm WHERE pm.project_name IS NOT NULL AND pm.project_name != '' ORDER BY pm.project_name
list.label: Project
list.name: project
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT pm.project_name FROM project_mapping pm WHERE pm.project_name IS NOT NULL AND pm.project_name != '' ORDER BY pm.project_name
